selected_projects.label: AI Support Portal
selected_projects.description: Customer-support web app with Python APIs, LLM-assisted summaries, ticket triage, audit logs, and human-review workflows.

selected_projects.label: Agent Eval Dashboard
selected_projects.description: Evaluation dashboard for testing agent outputs, tracking rubric scores, reviewing failures, and exporting feedback reports.

selected_projects.label: Operations API Platform
selected_projects.description: Internal FastAPI service layer for operational workflows, validation-heavy APIs, PostgreSQL persistence, and background task orchestration.

selected_projects.label: Internal Data Service
selected_projects.description: Backend data service using PostgreSQL, SQLAlchemy, migrations, integrity checks, reporting endpoints, and CI-backed tests.

selected_projects.label: Customer Onboarding CLI
selected_projects.description: Python CLI for onboarding customer data, validating configuration files, producing reports, and catching setup errors early.

selected_projects.label: Integration Sandbox
selected_projects.description: Developer sandbox for testing third-party API integrations, mocked responses, structured logs, and reproducible debugging scenarios.

bullets.text: Built LLM-assisted workflows with structured outputs and human-review boundaries.
Created agent-evaluation playbooks for debugging model behavior and reviewing failures.
Documented prompt, validation, and evaluation patterns for internal engineering teams.
Supported customer AI rollouts by translating product behavior into practical implementation guidance.
Built FastAPI-based customer tools with authentication, validation, and operational reporting.
Debugged customer API integrations by tracing requests, logs, schemas, and edge cases.
Designed service-layer APIs for internal workflows and external integrations.
Implemented Pydantic validation models for request parsing and structured application errors.
Improved backend logging to make production failures easier to diagnose.
Delivered live developer workshops on APIs, debugging workflows, and production-readiness basics.
Wrote onboarding tutorials and reference guides for developer-facing tools.
Created sample applications to demonstrate backend architecture and integration patterns.
Explained complex technical topics to mixed audiences of developers, managers, and customer stakeholders.
Maintained PostgreSQL schema migrations for internal data products.
Improved data-integrity checks across ingestion, transformation, and reporting workflows.
Built SQLAlchemy-backed reporting queries for operational dashboards.
Normalized customer import files and surfaced validation errors for review.
Added CI regression checks for backend services and integration utilities.
Containerized the local development stack with Docker for repeatable setup.
Wrote release checklists and runbooks for operational handoff.
Automated environment setup for local development and test workflows.

core_skills.Python: Python 3, type hints, pytest, packaging, logging, CLI tools, debugging
core_skills.Backend APIs: FastAPI, REST APIs, service-layer design, request validation, error handling
core_skills.LLM Integration: Structured LLM outputs, prompt contracts, validation, retries, human review
core_skills.Developer Enablement: Workshops, onboarding, examples, debugging guides, customer-facing technical support
core_skills.Technical Writing: Tutorials, implementation guides, runbooks, API examples, release notes
core_skills.Frontend Basics: React, TypeScript, simple dashboards, forms, API clients
core_skills.FastAPI: FastAPI routing, dependencies, schemas, testing, service boundaries
core_skills.PostgreSQL: Schema design, migrations, data integrity, SQL queries, relational modeling
core_skills.SQLAlchemy: SQLAlchemy ORM/Core, sessions, models, query composition, Alembic migrations
core_skills.Testing: pytest, fixtures, route tests, integration tests, validation tests
core_skills.Docker: Docker, Docker Compose, repeatable local environments
core_skills.CI/CD: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, automated checks, regression prevention
core_skills.Observability: Structured logging, error traces, operational debugging, failure diagnosis
core_skills.Security Basics: Auth flows, permissions, input validation, safe defaults
